organizing_committee.name: Theodoros Mastrokostopoulos
organizing_committee.bio: Senior expert at the European Central Bank working on supervisory technology and digital finance innovation.

organizing_committee.name: Eva Morin
organizing_committee.bio: Expert at the European Central Bank.

organizing_committee.name: Joerg Osterrieder
organizing_committee.bio: Professor and Coordinator of the MSCA Industrial Doctoral Network on Digital Finance (DIGITAL). Expert in quantitative finance, machine learning, and digital finance.

organizing_committee.name: Daniel Pele
organizing_committee.affiliation: Bucharest University of Economic Studies, Romania
organizing_committee.bio: Professor at the Bucharest University of Economic Studies. Research interests in financial econometrics and digital finance.

organizing_committee.name: Wolfgang Haerdle
organizing_committee.bio: Professor of Statistics and expert in computational statistics, quantitative finance, and machine learning.

organizing_committee.name: Maria Iannario
organizing_committee.affiliation: University of Naples Federico II, Italy
organizing_committee.bio: Professor at the University of Naples Federico II. Research interests in statistical modeling and digital finance applications.

organizing_committee.name: Codruta Mare
organizing_committee.bio: Professor at Babes-Bolyai University. Research in financial econometrics and digital finance.

organizing_committee.name: Claudia Tarantola
organizing_committee.bio: Full Professor of Statistics at the University of Milan. Associate Editor of JASA. Research in Bayesian statistics and quantitative finance.

organizing_committee.name: Alessandra Tanda
organizing_committee.bio: Associate Professor of Banking and Finance at the University of Pavia. Author of 'FinTech, BigTech and Banks'. Research in fintech and digital finance.
